reviews.review_description: I found this game when someone introduced it to me through another game. For this game being pretty new it’s great! The maps are great and so are the player models! I highly recommend this game! There are a few things that still needed to be added, but for now, it’s really good. And I’m not just saying that it’s good because I’m trying to be nice, I’m being genuine when I say it’s a good game. I can’t wait for future updates and for more ppl to find it! -AL
Such a good game I remember when it was just an apk tysm for making me admin crazytoast
